items.title: Is It Too Late to Revisit Boeing After Its 2025 Share Price Surge?
items.description: If you are wondering whether Boeing at around $206 is still a comeback story worth paying up for, or if the market has already priced in the recovery, you are in the right place. The stock is up 10.6% over the last week, 6.0% over the past month, and has climbed 20.0% year to date and 31.3% over the last year, even though the 5 year return is still a negative 9.8%. Those moves have come as investors refocus on Boeing's role in global aircraft demand and the long term replacement cycle for...
